features.title: Project + harness skeleton, runnable empty CLI
features.user_visible_behavior: `node bin/glassbox.js --version` prints a version and exits 0.
verification: node bin/glassbox.js --version exits 0 and prints a version string
node --test passes the smoke test
verify.ps1 / verify.sh passes (tests + no-network grep)
package.json declares no runtime dependencies
features.evidence: Slice 0 merged, tagged v0.1.0. cli.smoke.test.js (--version/--help/no-args) green; package.json has no dependencies; verify gate green (128/128 tests, no-network grep 0 hits).
features.notes: Slice 0. bin -> src/cli.js stub with --help/--version via util.parseArgs.

features.title: Discover, read, normalize and classify a real transcript
features.user_visible_behavior: `glassbox <transcript> --json out.json` writes per-type event counts without crashing.
verification: Discovery spike records confirmed schema fields in PROGRESS.md
--json output reports counts per event type on the sanitized real fixture
Malformed/truncated fixture completes and reports an accurate skipped count
CLASSIFICATION table updated to match real tool names observed
features.evidence: Slice 1 merged, tagged v0.2.0. Schema confirmed in PROGRESS.md; discover/read/normalize/classify tests green (read.test.js skip-count, normalize.test.js inference + correlation, classify.test.js). real-sanitized.jsonl normalizes to 28 events.
features.notes: Slice 1. Begins with the discovery spike (schema-investigator agent). All raw-schema knowledge confined to src/normalize.js.

features.title: Chronological timeline + self-contained HTML report + CLI
features.user_visible_behavior: `glassbox <transcript>` writes one self-contained HTML file showing a readable timeline.
verification: Single command writes a self-contained HTML report (exit 0)
HTML contains the chronological timeline entries
HTML has no external resource references (no http/https/cdn/link/fetch)
Report generates within the NFR-04 budget on a typical transcript
features.evidence: Slice 2 merged, tagged v0.3.0. timeline.test.js (ordering/counts/truncation), render.test.js (inline-only, no external URLs), integration.report.test.js (full pipeline writes HTML, exit 0) all green.
features.notes: Slice 2. Scorecard area is a placeholder until Slice 3.

features.title: Metric: Grep vs Semantic (BR-04)
features.user_visible_behavior: Scorecard shows search vs semantic counts and ratio; degrades to text-search-only when no semantic tools exist.
verification: Unit test covers the normal path (search + semantic present)
Unit test covers the degraded path (no semantic -> status unknown + note)
features.evidence: Slice 3 merged, tagged v0.4.0. metrics.grepSemantic.test.js covers normal + degraded (text-search-only) paths; green.
features.notes: Slice 3. One file src/metrics/grepSemantic.js + registry entry. LSP-tool identity resolved in Slice 1 (Open Question 2).

features.title: Metric: Early Victory (BR-05)
features.user_visible_behavior: Scorecard flags completion claimed without a passing verification afterward.
verification: Unit test: claim without post-edit passing verify -> raised
Unit test: no edits / no claim / undeterminable verify -> not raised or status unknown
features.evidence: Slice 3 merged, tagged v0.4.0. metrics.earlyVictory.test.js covers raised/not-raised/unknown; correlation fixed (normalize.correlation.test.js) so the post-edit verify is matched by block id.

features.title: Metric: Verification Density (BR-06)
features.user_visible_behavior: Scorecard shows edits per successful verify; infinity/alert when there are zero successful verifies.
verification: Unit test: normal ratio computed from edits and successful verifies
Unit test: zero successful verifies -> ratio infinity, status alert
features.evidence: Slice 3 merged, tagged v0.4.0. metrics.verificationDensity.test.js covers normal ratio and infinity/alert; block-id correlation regression-tested in normalize.correlation.test.js.

features.title: Metric: Overreach (BR-07)
features.user_visible_behavior: Scorecard shows distinct files changed per task and flags out-of-scope edits when --scope is given.
verification: Unit test: distinct changed-file count per task segment
Unit test: with --scope globs, out-of-scope targets are flagged; without scope, count only
features.evidence: Slice 3 merged, tagged v0.4.0. metrics.overreach.test.js covers per-task distinct counts and scoped/unscoped flagging; green.

features.title: Metric: Continuity (BR-08)
features.user_visible_behavior: Scorecard reports whether the state/progress file was read before the first edit.
verification: Unit test: state file read before first edit -> true
Unit test: no edits -> n/a; no read data -> unknown
features.evidence: Slice 3 merged, tagged v0.4.0. metrics.continuity.test.js covers state-read-before-edit true, n/a (no edits), and unknown (no read data); green.

features.title: Metric: Loop Detection (BR-09)
features.user_visible_behavior: Scorecard reports repeated identical tool calls / repeated edits above a threshold.
verification: Unit test: a tool call repeated >= threshold is flagged (uses stableStringify)
Unit test: a file edited >= threshold times is flagged
features.evidence: Slice 3 merged, tagged v0.4.0. metrics.loopDetection.test.js covers repeated-call and repeated-edit detection at threshold; green.

features.title: Optional secret redaction
features.user_visible_behavior: `--redact` scrubs seeded secrets from the HTML and shows a count; without it a sensitivity warning is shown.
verification: With --redact, seeded secrets do not appear in the HTML; count shown
Without --redact, the report renders and shows the sensitivity warning
features.evidence: Slice 4 merged, tagged v0.5.0. redact.test.js asserts each seeded secret kind is scrubbed with an accurate count and non-secret text is preserved; sensitivity warning shown when --redact absent; green.

features.title: Two-session comparison report
features.user_visible_behavior: `glassbox compare a.jsonl b.jsonl` produces one HTML page comparing both sessions on all six metrics.
verification: compare produces one HTML page with all six metrics side by side
Numeric deltas are correct and direction-labelled (improvement vs regression)
No external resource references (AC-11)
features.evidence: Slice 5 merged, tagged v1.0.0. integration.compare.test.js asserts one HTML page comparing all six metrics with correct direction-labelled deltas and no external resources; green.
